Title: Type Construction and Cycle Detection
Author: Mark Freeman
Snippet: Go 1.26 simplifies type construction and enhances cycle detection for certain kinds of recursive types.

Title: //go:fix inline and the source-level inliner
Author: Alan Donovan
Snippet: How Go 1.26's source-level inliner works, and how it can help you with self-service API migrations.

Title: Allocating on the Stack
Author: Keith Randall
Snippet: A description of some of the recent changes to do allocations on the stack instead of the heap.

Title: Using go fix to modernize Go code
Author: Alan Donovan
Snippet: Go 1.26 includes a new implementation of go fix that can help you use more modern features of Go.

Title: Go 1.26 is released
Author: Carlos Amedee, on behalf of the Go team
Snippet: Go 1.26 adds a new garbage collector, cgo overhead reduction, experimental simd/archsimd package, experimental runtime/secret package, and more.

Title: Results from the 2025 Go Developer Survey
Author: Todd Kulesza, on behalf of the Go team
Snippet: The 2025 Go Developer Survey results, focused on developer sentiment towards Go, use cases, challenges, and developer environments.

Title: Go’s Sweet 16
Author: Austin Clements, for the Go team

Title: The Green Tea Garbage Collector
Author: Michael Knyszek and Austin Clements
Snippet: Go 1.25 includes a new experimental garbage collector, Green Tea.

Title: Flight Recorder in Go 1.25
Author: Carlos Amedee and Michael Knyszek
Snippet: Go 1.25 introduces a new tool in the diagnostic toolbox, flight recording.

Title: It's survey time! How has Go has been working out for you?
Author: Todd Kulesza, on behalf of the Go team
Snippet: Help shape the future of Go
